title: Eva Love in Japan
wikitext:
[]: Eva Love in Japan             Quote Post by Vulkurt » Tue Jul 10, 2007 4:24 pm Hi, all! Just got back from 2 weeks in Japan. While I didn't see one bit of anime on tv (of course, everywhere I stayed did not have cable), there was plenty of Eva to be seen. Here's a few posters for Eva pachinko machines in Kyoto across the street from Kyoto Station: http://www.profdutterer.com/p1.jpg http://www.profdutterer.com/p2.jpg This was a poster for Final Project (sorry it came out so blurry - lots of people walking in front of it) in Akihabara: http://www.profdutterer.com/fp.jpg And finally, in the first floor of the Don Quijote Akihabara superstore, there was what appeared to be a pachinko parlor completely dedicated to Eva (couldn't go in to check - allergic to cigarette smoke). This was the entrance: http://www.profdutterer.com/lo.jpg Most stores I went to in Akihabara (other than Animate) featured Eva, Bleach, and Ookiku Furikabutte. Lots of Eva stuff, including some canned coffee that appears to be an Eva branded product. Lots of Eva stuff in the Tokyo Anime Center (which really only amounts to a gift shop).

[]: Re: Eva Love in Japan             Quote Post by Ornette » Tue Jul 10, 2007 4:34 pm Vulkurt wrote: Lots of Eva stuff, including some canned coffee that appears to be an Eva branded product.

[]:             Quote Post by Ayana-Me » Tue Jul 10, 2007 4:39 pm I wonder how many times that 1:1 Asuka doll display case has been smashed open. I keep mine under my bed :? I could totally go for living some place where Eva is shoved in your face all the time.

[]: Re: Eva Love in Japan             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Tue Jul 10, 2007 6:11 pm Vulkurt wrote: Hi, all! Just got back from 2 weeks in Japan.

[]:             Quote Post by TheAyanamiOtaku » Tue Jul 10, 2007 9:39 pm i thought Asuka was a little shorter than that! maybe cos it's on a stand to make it look taller xO

[]: Re: Eva Love in Japan             Quote Post by Vulkurt » Wed Jul 11, 2007 6:05 am Ornette wrote: You mean this kind of stuff? I can't remember how many different ones they have, mainly the Eva cast, I think there are pictures of the all on the Evangelion website.

[]: Re: Eva Love in Japan             Quote Post by Vulkurt » Wed Jul 11, 2007 6:09 am The Eva Monkey wrote: Vulkurt wrote: Hi, all! Just got back from 2 weeks in Japan.

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Wed Jul 11, 2007 9:18 pm Interesting how Gainax's milking Rebuild by re-selling that UCC Coffee again. I think these covers are "prettier". Thanks for the pics; I love it! And ZOMG I want that Asuka poster!! (inside the case with that giant kinda-creepy Asuka doll)

[]:             Quote Post by TheAyanamiOtaku » Sat Jul 14, 2007 2:13 am i wonder what that 1:1 doll was made out of. looks like those stuff that are made out of mannequins. in that case, i really dont want that statue. always get a feeling that their eyes are following me. :shock: unless there is a Rei statue: me: why are you paying so close attention to me, Rei? Rei Statue: ... me: oh right thanks for reminding me that my hair is on fire. Rei Statue: ... me: no? it's not? are ya sure? Rei Statue: ... me: yeah i guess not. what a silly thought, huh?
